name: autofix
description: CI autofix agent: diagnoses build/lint/test failures and applies minimal, verified fixes.

postToolUse.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(cat | jq -r .tool_input.path 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in *.rs) cargo fmt -- "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac'
bash -c 'FILE=$(cat | jq -r .tool_input.path 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in *.rs) cargo fmt -- "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac'
